title: Slack Digest Engine - Digests
description: Slack channel digest history including decisions, action items, mentions, and key threads. Created on first run via lazy DB creation.

Digest Title.description: Formatted as 'Slack Digest YYYY-MM-DD' for daily digests.

Channel(s).description: Comma-separated list of channel names that were scanned for this digest.

Time Window.description: Human-readable time window description (e.g., 'Last 24 hours', 'Last 8 hours', 'Since 2026-03-01').

Messages Analyzed.description: Total number of messages scanned before noise filtering.

Decisions Count.description: Number of decisions detected (high and medium confidence).

Action Items Count.description: Number of explicit action items extracted.

Mentions Count.description: Number of @mentions of the current user detected.

Digest Content.description: Full digest markdown content including all sections (decisions, action items, mentions, key threads, channel summaries).

Generated At.description: Timestamp when the digest was generated. Used with Channel(s) for idempotent same-day updates.

notes: The plugin searches for this database by name before creating it (lazy creation). Idempotent updates use the combination of Channel(s) + Generated At (same calendar day) to prevent duplicates — re-running a digest for the same channels on the same day overwrites the existing record. The /slack:catch-up command does NOT write to this database (ephemeral by design).
